events.title: Delimitation
events.description: Boundaries of electoral constituencies are drawn.

events.title: Voter Registration
events.description: Citizens register to vote and electoral rolls are updated.

events.title: Model Code of Conduct
events.description: Rules come into effect ensuring a level playing field.

events.title: Polling Day
events.description: Registered voters cast their votes at designated booths.

events.title: Security Deployment
events.description: Police and paramilitary forces ensure peaceful voting.

events.title: Sealing of EVMs
events.description: After voting, EVMs are sealed and sent to strong rooms.

events.title: Counting of Votes
events.description: EVMs are opened and votes are counted in presence of candidates' agents.

events.title: Declaration of Results
events.description: The Returning Officer officially declares the winner.

events.title: Formation of Government
events.description: The majority party/coalition is invited by the President/Governor to form the government.
